insights.title: Forecast ↑ — Expect App Total Revenue to rebound next period — App Total New Subs +12.0%, led by YCP.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +12.0% runs far above its upstream (App Total New User +1.3%, App Total Install +2.0%; Δ +10.4pp) — the trial cohort is larger than acquisition alone implies. With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to rise next period. App Total Revenue is currently -5.5%, so this points to a rebound, not continued weakness. The lift is concentrated in YCP (+29.4%); YMK is -0.2%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's -5.1% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 06-23 vs 06-16 = -5.1% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-16 vs 06-09 = +5.5% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP surging (+29.4% vs upstream -4.4%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP +29.4% vs upstream -4.4% (conversion surging); All App +12.0% vs upstream +1.6% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Revenue down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Revenue is down across every app (All App -5.5%, YMK -3.8%, YCP -8.0%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.

insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +8.5% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -0.6%, App Total Install +1.9%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue this wk vs prior wk = -2.6% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs prior wk vs the week before = -0.7% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP surging (+17.1% vs upstream -2.2%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP +17.1% vs upstream -2.2% (conversion surging); All App +8.5% vs upstream +0.7% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Revenue down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Revenue is down across every app (All App -2.6%, YMK -1.6%, YCP -6.4%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
